pg.query:
WITH RandomCustomers AS (
    SELECT c.id
    FROM pg_custs c
    JOIN pg_orders o ON c.id = o.c_id 
    WHERE c.id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY c.id
    ORDER BY RANDOM()
    LIMIT 800  
)
SELECT 
    c.id AS client_hash, 
    p.sku AS product_code, 
    i.qty AS quantity, 
    p.price AS price, 
    o.d_date AS transaction_date 
FROM pg_items i 
JOIN pg_orders o ON i.o_id = o.id 
JOIN pg_custs c ON o.c_id = c.id 
JOIN pg_prods p ON i.p_id = p.id 
JOIN RandomCustomers rc ON c.id = rc.id

mysql.query: SELECT c.login, s.item_sku, 1 as qty, s.item_price, s.sale_dt AS transaction_date FROM my_sales_flat s JOIN my_clients c ON s.client_id = c.uid ORDER BY RAND()

mssql.query: SELECT con.RealName, cat.Art, l.Qty, cat.Val, h.DocDate AS transaction_date FROM MS_Lines l JOIN MS_Header h ON l.HID = h.HID JOIN MS_Base b ON h.BID = b.BID JOIN MS_Contact con ON b.BID = con.BID JOIN MS_Catalog cat ON l.PID = cat.PID ORDER BY NEWID()
